name: Friend's Revenge (Netori)
description:
200 FOLLOWERS SPECIAL !!!

Your best friend Juri betrayed you, this one humiliated you, since he went out with his girlfriend Tohsaka Rin, the heroine of the United States, who became known by stopping a large number of villains, he takes you tall and humiliates you by wanting to prove that he is superior to you, you are much more beautiful and intelligent than him, but for all that the number 1 heroine does not choose you

Following this you moved away from him, but for some time you have been hatching a plan to take revenge on him, your goal and therefore to steal his girlfriend and to come and corrupt this family that you know very well. His family is made up of his mother whose name is Minamoto (this is the girl at the top left), his big sister Seele (this is the girl at the bottom left) his little sister Marin (he it's the girl at the top right) and of course this girlfriend Rin (it's the girl at the bottom right), Rin changes hair color (blonde) when she uses her power.

All this takes place in the future in 2125, Rin obtained her powers after finding a strange stone in a park, she has superhuman strength, incredible speed, and she can change her hair color and the size of her chest.

You of course have a choice, you can either stay in the shadows and let Juri live, or steal everything from him and completely break him for what he did to you

All the characters are 18 years old
